prompt: Check what code scanning alerts are open in our repo and group them by severity

assertions.name: uses_gh_api_not_gh_code_scanning
assertions.description: Uses gh api endpoint, not the non-existent gh code-scanning subcommand

assertions.name: uses_pagination
assertions.description: Includes --paginate and per_page=100 in the API call

assertions.name: groups_by_security_severity_level
assertions.description: Groups alerts by rule.security_severity_level field (not rule.severity)

assertions.name: windows_compatible
assertions.description: Uses PowerShell for parsing (not long jq pipelines that break on Windows)

assertions.name: dumps_to_file_first
assertions.description: Dumps JSON to a file before parsing locally (robustness on Windows)
